metadata.title: Day Planner
metadata.description: A day planner with clean UI and readable syntax

name:"Sort tasks under cursor by time"

text:"日期& 时间 格式"

regex.source: text:"Only the items under this heading (and its subheadings) are going to be pulled from daily notes."
regex.target: text:"只有这个标题（及其子标题）下的项目才会从日常笔记中提取出来。"

regex.source: text:"If left empty, the plugin will pull all items from daily notes."
regex.target: text:"如果留空，插件将从日常笔记中提取所有项目。"

regex.source: text:"Also used when creating a plan with drag-and-drop."
regex.target: text:"在使用拖放创建计划时也会被使用"

regex.source: text:"Define a background color for a block containing some text (it might be a tag, like '#important'). The first color is for light mode, the second is for dark mode."
regex.target: text:"为包含一些文本的块定义一个背景颜色（它可能是一个标签，如 “#important”）。第一种颜色用于浅色模式，第二种颜色用于深色模式。"

regex.source: text:`The following files need to be created: ${D.join("; ")}`
.setName("Center the Pointer in the Timeline View")
.setName("Sort tasks in planner chronologically after edits")
regex.target: .setName("在进行编辑后，按时间顺序对计划器中的任务进行排序")

regex.source: .setName("Prepend this text to events from this calendar")
regex.target: .setName("将这段文本添加到此日历中的事件前面。")

regex.source: .setName("Your email address, used to show 'tentative'/'needs action'/'declined' marker")
regex.target: .setName("你的电子邮件地址，用于显示 “暂定”/“需要行动”/“已拒绝” 标记。")

regex.source: .setName("Show a timestamp next to task text in timeline")
regex.target: .setName("在时间线中任务文本旁边显示时间戳")

regex.source: .setName("Stretch task until next one in timeline if it has no end time")
regex.target: .setName("如果任务没有结束时间，则将其延伸至时间线上的下一个任务")

regex.source: .setDesc("Display a notification when a new task is started")
.setDesc("Should the pointer continuously get scrolled to the center of the view")
regex.target: .setDesc("指针是否应该持续滚动到视图的中心")

regex.source: .setDesc("The zoom level to display the timeline. The higher the number, the more vertical space each task will take up.")
regex.target: .setDesc("显示时间轴的缩放级别。数字越高，每个任务占用的垂直空间就越大。")

regex.source: .setDesc("You can use custom statuses for more advanced workflows. E.g.: '- [>] Task'")
regex.target: .setDesc("你可以使用自定义状态来实现更高级的工作流程。例如：“- [>] Task”。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The icon of the timeline pane. Reopen timeline pane or restart obsidian to see the change.")
regex.target: .setDesc("时间线窗格的图标。重新打开时间线窗格或重新启动 Obsidian 以查看更改。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The planner is going to start at this hour each day")
regex.target: .setDesc("计划程序将在每天的这个时间开始")

regex.source: .setDesc("When you create a planner in a file, this level of heading is going to be used")
regex.target: .setDesc("当你在文件中创建一个计划器时，将使用这种级别的标题。")

regex.source: .setDesc('By "no end time" we mean "- [ ] 10:00 Wake up" instead of "- [ ] 10:00 - 11:00 Wake up"')
regex.target: .setDesc('“没有结束时间” 时，指的是 “- [ ] 10:00 Wake up” 这种形式，即只有一个时间点表示醒来的时间，而不是 “- [ ] 10:00 - 11:00 Wake up” 这种有开始时间和结束时间范围的形式。')

regex.source: .setDesc("While editing, tasks are going to get rounded to this number")
regex.target: .setDesc("在编辑时，任务将会四舍五入到这个数字")

regex.source: .setDesc("Used when you create a task with drag-and-drop & when you don't specify an end time")
regex.target: .setDesc("当你使用拖放创建任务以及当你没有指定结束时间的时候使用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Used when you create a task with drag-and-drop")
regex.target: .setDesc("当你使用拖放方式创建任务时使用")

regex.source: .setDesc("If the planner timeline should be monochrome or color tasks based on time of day")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果计划时间表应该是基于一天中的时间来确定任务是单色显示还是彩色显示。")

regex.source: .appendText("This is the format used in the time ruler. Use 'H' for 24 hours; use 'h' for 12 hours. Your current syntax looks like this: ")
regex.target: .appendText("这是时间标尺中使用的格式。使用“H”表示 24 小时制；使用“h”表示 12 小时制。你的当前语法看起来像这样： ")

regex.source: .appendText("When you create or edit tasks with drag-and-drop, the plugin use this format. Use 'HH:mm' for 24 hours; use 'hh:mm' for 12 hours. Your current syntax looks like this: ")
regex.target: .appendText("当你使用拖放方式创建或编辑任务时，插件使用这种格式。使用 “HH:mm” 表示 24 小时制；使用 “hh:mm” 表示 12 小时制。你的当前语法看起来像这样： ")
.appendText("你的当前语法看起来像这样：")
